title: epilobium torreyi
intro: Epilobium torreyi, also known as Zalma willowherb or Torrey's willowherb, is a perennial plant species in the family Onagraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Epilobium torreyi is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an anticoagulant, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. The plant can be prepared as a tincture or infusion for herbal use, and is also sometimes used as a dietary supplement, but users should consult with a healthcare professional before consuming it.
